case_title: IAN MICHAEL SADOWSKI VS. ROBERT Q. RHEAUME

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2019 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-17-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT CREDITOR IAN MICHAEL SADOWSKI IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR ROBERT RHEAUME IS PRESENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PARTIES WILL APPEAR IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE JAN-17-2019 HEARING THE MATTER IS TO BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
